MENU
  • Introduction
  • Authenticating requests
  • 服务端端点 API (Server Nodes)
    • UniProxy 模块
      • GET api/v1/server/UniProxy/config
      • GET api/v1/server/UniProxy/user
      • POST api/v1/server/UniProxy/push
      • POST api/v1/server/UniProxy/alive
      • GET api/v1/server/UniProxy/alivelist
      • POST api/v1/server/UniProxy/status
    • ShadowsocksTidalab 模块
      • GET api/v1/server/ShadowsocksTidalab/user
      • POST api/v1/server/ShadowsocksTidalab/submit
    • TrojanTidalab 模块
      • GET api/v1/server/TrojanTidalab/config
      • GET api/v1/server/TrojanTidalab/user
      • POST api/v1/server/TrojanTidalab/submit
    • Handshake 模块
      • server handshake api
    • Report 模块
      • node report api - merge traffic + alive + status POST /api/v2/server/node/report
    • Config 模块
      • GET api/v2/server/config
    • User 模块
      • GET api/v2/server/user
    • Push 模块
      • POST api/v2/server/push
    • Alive 模块
      • POST api/v2/server/alive
    • Alivelist 模块
      • GET api/v2/server/alivelist
    • Status 模块
      • POST api/v2/server/status
  • 用户端 API (User & Guest)
    • Client 模块
      • 获取节点订阅配置 (Subscribe)
    • App 模块
      • 获取客户端配置(Clash)
      • 获取客户端最新版本
      • 获取客户端全量配置 (V2)
      • 获取客户端更新引导 (V2)
    • Plan 模块
      • 获取所有的前台展示套餐
      • 获取订阅计划列表/详情
    • Telegram 模块
      • Telegram Bot Webhook 回调地址
      • 获取绑定的机器人信息
    • Payment 模块
      • 支付网关异步回调通知 (Webhook)
    • Comm 模块
      • 获取访客公共配置
      • 发送邮箱验证码
      • 记录邀请链接访问次数 (PV)
      • GET api/v1/user/comm/config
      • POST api/v1/user/comm/getStripePublicKey
      • 发送邮箱验证码
      • 记录邀请链接访问次数 (PV)
    • Auth 模块
      • 用户注册
      • 用户登录
      • 通过token登录
      • 忘记密码处理
      • 获取快速登录URL
      • 通过邮件链接登录
      • 用户注册
      • 用户登录
      • 通过token登录
      • 忘记密码处理
      • 获取快速登录URL
      • 通过邮件链接登录
    • User 模块
      • 重置订阅链接与安全凭证
      • 获取用户信息
      • 修改用户密码
      • 修改通知偏好设置
      • 获取订阅信息与流量详情
      • 获取个人统计指标
      • 检查当前登录状态
      • 佣金划转余额
      • 获取免密快速登录URL (快速登录)
      • 获取活跃会话列表
      • 移除指定的登录会话
      • 重置订阅链接与安全凭证
      • 获取用户信息
    • Order 模块
      • 创建订单
      • 订单支付(Checkout)
      • 检查订单状态
      • 获取订单详情
      • 获取订单列表
      • 获取可用支付方式
      • 取消订单
    • Invite 模块
      • 生成新的邀请码
      • 获取邀请面板统计信息
      • 获取返利佣金明细记录
    • Notice 模块
      • 获取系统公告
    • Ticket 模块
      • 回复工单
      • 关闭工单
      • 创建工单
      • 获取工单列表/详情
      • 发起提现工单申请
    • Server 模块
      • 获取可用服务器节点
    • Coupon 模块
      • 校验/获取优惠券信息
    • Gift-card 模块
      • 查询兑换码信息
      • 使用兑换码
      • 获取用户兑换记录
      • 获取兑换记录详情
      • 获取可用的礼品卡类型
    • Knowledge 模块
      • 获取知识库文章列表/详情
    • Stat 模块
      • 获取历史流量消耗日志
  • 管理后台 API (Admin)
    • Config 模块
      • 获取系统全量配置
      • 保存系统配置修改
      • 获取已有邮件模板列表
      • 获取已有前端主题模板列表
      • 设定/更新 Telegram Webhook
      • 测试发送测试邮件
    • Plan 模块
      • 获取后台订阅套餐列表
      • 创建或保存（修改）订阅套餐
      • 彻底删除某个订阅套餐
      • 快捷更新套餐状态（上下架/可续费）
      • 更新前台套餐展示排序
    • Server\Group 模块
      • 获取所有服节点分组名称类别
      • 建立保存配置新建分组
      • 从系统移除删除废弃服务器分组
    • Server\Route 模块
      • 拉出目前现役的全部路由策略/过滤分流策略
      • 增加/更新定制拦截路由记录
      • 删除不再使用或废弃掉的分流屏蔽策略指令
    • Server\Manage 模块
      • 获取节点服务器基本列表
      • 手动更新节点呈现排列次序
      • 切换节点隐藏展现控制
      • 保存/更新基础节点配置
      • 销毁彻底删除指定节点
      • 依据所选旧节点全盘克隆一份设定参数产生新节点
      • 批量删除节点
      • 重置独立节点的流量消耗计分缓存清零
      • 批量重置节点流量
    • Order 模块
      • 获取订单列表
      • 更新订单抽成状态等简要设置
      • 后台强制分发创建订单
      • 手动标记订单已支付
      • 手动取消未支付订单
      • 获取订单详情
    • User 模块
      • 高级筛选分页搜索全站用户
      • 更新保存普通用户的各类参数
      • 获取特定用户详细档口
      • 矩阵式新户批量生成
      • 大规模导出筛选的用户明细 CSV
      • 向范围选定用户发送系统批次邮件广播
      • 批量封禁违规用户群
      • 重置用户的安全令牌凭据
      • 斩草除根：深层销毁用户全部痕迹
    • Stat 模块
      • 获取后台总览统计大盘
      • 获取带有相对增长率的新款超级统计大盘
      • 获取当日各节点实时跑量排名
      • 获取昨日各节点流量排行榜单
      • 获取财务收入流水及佣金对账表
      • 提取特定用户的详细流量上报日志
      • 取通用历史归档统计单线图表趋势集
      • 获取最新流量飙车/消耗冠军榜排名
    • Notice 模块
      • 获取公告列表
      • 创建/保存编辑公告
      • 彻底抹除公告
      • 切换单个公告显示状态
      • 公告重排序
    • Ticket 模块
      • 获取工单列表详情
      • 回复工单消息
      • 强制关闭截断工单
    • Coupon 模块
      • 获取优惠券列表
      • 生成/编辑优惠券
      • 彻底删除优惠券
      • 切换优惠券激活状态
      • 更新优惠券信息
    • Gift-card 模块
      • 获取礼品卡模板列表
      • 创建礼品卡模板
      • 更新礼品卡模板
      • 删除礼品卡模板
      • 生成并印发兑换码
      • 获取发放兑换码列表
      • 禁用/启用兑换码
      • 导出兑换码(直接拉文件)
      • 更新单个兑换码
      • 删除礼品卡
      • 获取用户使用核销记录
      • 获取礼品系统使用统计大盘数据
      • 获取所有可用的礼品卡类型
    • Knowledge 模块
      • 获取知识库文章列表/单页
      • 获取已有知识库分类
      • 保存/创建知识库文章
      • 切换文章是否展示
      • 删除单篇知识文章
      • 更新知识分类/文章排序
    • Payment 模块
      • 获取管理端支付网关列表
      • 获取支持的支付插件列表
      • 获取支付网关表单配置
      • 保存/编辑支付配置
      • 删除支付通道
      • 切换支付网关开启状态
      • 支付通道排序
    • System 模块
      • 重获系统关键进程健康情况
      • 集中统计系统各项工作进程开销和历史堆积量
      • 读取所有可用队列的运行负载数据
      • Get all of the master supervisors and their underlying supervisors.
      • 获取队列所有曾经爆炸执行失败的报错任务
      • 拉取管理员操作行纪审计记录
    • Theme 模块
      • 获取已安装所有前端主题列表及启用情况
      • 上传扩展新主题皮肤包
      • 删除物理皮肤结构
      • 固化更新当前这套特供主题选项
      • 获取主题下辖自定义配置表单项集
    • Plugin 模块
      • 获取所有插件类型
      • 获取已有插件列表
      • 全新上传自用插件 zip 压缩包
      • 物理删除无用的插件代码结构
      • 安装系统插件
      • 卸载插件
      • 启动/启用插件功能
      • 关停/禁用插件
      • 获取某个插件运行选项配置
      • 提交保存插件设置
      • 升级更新插件
    • Traffic-reset 模块
      • 获取流量重置日志列表
      • 获取流量重置统计信息
      • 获取单用户流量重置历史
      • 手动重置用户流量
  • View Postman collection
  • View OpenAPI spec
  • Documentation powered by Scribe ✍
  • Last updated: April 15, 2026

Introduction

Base URL: https://47.79.38.161

This documentation aims to provide all the information you need to work with our API.

As you scroll, you'll see code examples for working with the API in different programming languages in the dark area to the right (or as part of the content on mobile). You can switch the language used with the tabs at the top right (or from the nav menu at the top left on mobile).

Authenticating requests

This API is not authenticated.

服务端端点 API (Server Nodes)

UniProxy 模块

GET api/v1/server/UniProxy/config

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/server/UniProxy/config" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/server/UniProxy/config"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (422):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "validation.required (and 1 more error)",
    "errors": {
        "token": [
            "validation.required"
        ],
        "node_id": [
            "validation.required"
        ]
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/server/UniProxy/config

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

POST api/v1/server/UniProxy/status

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/server/UniProxy/status" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"cpu\": 14,
    \"mem\": {
        \"total\": 6,
        \"used\": 73
    },
    \"swap\": {
        \"total\": 9,
        \"used\": 20
    },
    \"disk\": {
        \"total\": 53,
        \"used\": 0
    }
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/server/UniProxy/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "cpu": 14,
    "mem": {
        "total": 6,
        "used": 73
    },
    "swap": {
        "total": 9,
        "used": 20
    },
    "disk": {
        "total": 53,
        "used": 0
    }
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/server/UniProxy/status

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

cpu   number     

validation.min validation.max. Example: 14

mem   object  optional    
total   integer     

validation.min. Example: 6

used   integer     

validation.min. Example: 73

swap   object  optional    
total   integer     

validation.min. Example: 9

used   integer     

validation.min. Example: 20

disk   object  optional    
total   integer     

validation.min. Example: 53

used   integer     

validation.min. Example: 0

ShadowsocksTidalab 模块

GET api/v1/server/ShadowsocksTidalab/user

    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/server/ShadowsocksTidalab/user"

    "Accept": "application/json",

    headers,

TrojanTidalab 模块

GET api/v1/server/TrojanTidalab/config

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/server/TrojanTidalab/config" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"node_id\": \"vel\",
    \"local_port\": \"qui\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/server/TrojanTidalab/config"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "node_id": "vel",
    "local_port": "qui"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (422):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "validation.required",
    "errors": {
        "token": [
            "validation.required"
        ]
    }
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/server/TrojanTidalab/config

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

node_id   string     

Example: vel

local_port   string     

Example: qui

Status 模块

POST api/v2/server/status

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/server/status" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"cpu\": 20,
    \"mem\": {
        \"total\": 49,
        \"used\": 56
    },
    \"swap\": {
        \"total\": 60,
        \"used\": 29
    },
    \"disk\": {
        \"total\": 41,
        \"used\": 5
    }
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/server/status"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "cpu": 20,
    "mem": {
        "total": 49,
        "used": 56
    },
    "swap": {
        "total": 60,
        "used": 29
    },
    "disk": {
        "total": 41,
        "used": 5
    }
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/server/status

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

cpu   number     

validation.min validation.max. Example: 20

mem   object  optional    
total   integer     

validation.min. Example: 49

used   integer     

validation.min. Example: 56

swap   object  optional    
total   integer     

validation.min. Example: 60

used   integer     

validation.min. Example: 29

disk   object  optional    
total   integer     

validation.min. Example: 41

used   integer     

validation.min. Example: 5

用户端 API (User & Guest)

Client 模块

获取节点订阅配置 (Subscribe)

各大代理客户端（如Clash, V2ray, Shadowrocket等）使用的统一订阅获取接口。 根据请求头的 User-Agent 或 flag 动态下发对应格式的协议节点配置。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/client/subscribe?flag=error&types=quas&filter=ex" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"types\": \"aut\",
    \"filter\": \"quas\",
    \"flag\": \"nostrum\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/client/subscribe"
);

const params = {
    "flag": "error",
    "types": "quas",
    "filter": "ex",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "types": "aut",
    "filter": "quas",
    "flag": "nostrum"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


plain/text
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/client/subscribe

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

flag   string  optional    

强制指定客户端类型标识(如 clash, v2ray, shadowrocket) Example: error

types   string  optional    

取特定的节点类型（如 vmess|vless|trojan) Example: quas

filter   string  optional    

只保留包含特定关键字名称的节点 Example: ex

Body Parameters

types   string  optional    

Example: aut

filter   string  optional    

Example: quas

flag   string  optional    

Example: nostrum

App 模块

获取客户端配置(Clash)

该接口主要用于定制化客户端获取Clash规格的YAML格式配置。 根据当前登录用户是否具备有效订阅，返回包含相应节点代理信息的配置文件。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/client/app/getConfig" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/client/app/getConfig"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


plain/text
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/client/app/getConfig

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

proxies   string[]     
proxy-groups   string[]     

获取客户端最新版本

检测各个平台 (Windows, macOS, Android) 配置中的最新可用版本及下载链接，用于引导客户下载升级。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/client/app/getVersion" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/client/app/getVersion"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "token is null",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/client/app/getVersion

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
windows_version   string     
windows_download_url   string     
macos_version   string     
macos_download_url   string     
android_version   string     
android_download_url   string     

获取客户端全量配置 (V2)

一次性获取应用的各种系统设置，如应用信息、开关状态、UI配色、规则和支付设定等，供给专门定制的V2客户端使用。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/client/app/getConfig" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/client/app/getConfig"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

    "message": "token is null",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept

features   object

Plan 模块

获取所有的前台展示套餐

返回所有可供游客/新注册用户购买的订阅计划详情列表。该接口在游客页面下即可访问，无需登录。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/plan/fetch" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/plan/fetch"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "success",
    "message": "操作成功",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "group_id": 1,
            "name": "A",
            "tags": [],
            "content": "## 套餐详情\n\n- 流量：200 GB\n- 速度限制：1 Mbps\n- 同时在线设备：2 台\n\n## 服务说明\n\n1. 流量按月重置\n2. 支持多平台使用\n3. 7×24小时技术支持",
            "month_price": 10000,
            "quarter_price": 30000,
            "half_year_price": 50000,
            "year_price": 80000,
            "two_year_price": 160000,
            "three_year_price": 250000,
            "onetime_price": 0,
            "reset_price": 0,
            "capacity_limit": 3,
            "transfer_enable": 200,
            "speed_limit": 1,
            "device_limit": 2,
            "show": true,
            "sell": true,
            "renew": true,
            "reset_traffic_method": 1,
            "sort": null,
            "created_at": 1775767099,
            "updated_at": 1775767108
        }
    ],
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/guest/plan/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   string[]     

获取订阅计划列表/详情

用于用户侧拉取当前站点的所有可售订阅套餐，或者查看某个具体套餐的详情。 用户权限不足时无法查看到隐藏套餐。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/plan/fetch?id=1" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/plan/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "id": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/user/plan/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

id   integer  optional    

可选，传入具体订阅计划ID获取详细信息 Example: 1

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
id   integer     
name   string     
content   string     
month_price        

numeric

Telegram 模块

Telegram Bot Webhook 回调地址

用于接收 Telegram 服务器端推送过来的用户交互消息、加群请求等，通过 Hook 机制分发处理逻辑。 该地址高度保密且需携带设定好的 accessToken 防止被恶意请求。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/telegram/webhook" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"access_token\": \"md5string\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/telegram/webhook"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "access_token": "md5string"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/guest/telegram/webhook

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

access_token   string     

Telegram通信密钥配置 Example: md5string

获取绑定的机器人信息

用于前端展示当前系统对接的Telegram机器人的名字和链接，引导用户去绑定。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/telegram/getBotInfo" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/telegram/getBotInfo"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}

GET api/v1/user/telegram/getBotInfo

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
username   string     

Payment 模块

支付网关异步回调通知 (Webhook)

用于接收第三方支付平台异步发送的订单支付结果通知，验证签名后更改内部订单状态并下发服务。 该接口无需身份认证，完全依赖网关签名校验。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/payment/notify/natus/145d25e7-6a57-3fa8-b247-30ebcaf7daa8" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/payment/notify/natus/145d25e7-6a57-3fa8-b247-30ebcaf7daa8"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):


plain/text
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/guest/payment/notify/{method}/{uuid}

POST api/v1/guest/payment/notify/{method}/{uuid}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

method   string     

Example: natus

uuid   string     

Example: 145d25e7-6a57-3fa8-b247-30ebcaf7daa8

Comm 模块

获取访客公共配置

在用户未登录状态下，前端拉取站点配置参数（包括验证码密钥、注册限制和基础网站信息等）。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/comm/config" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/guest/comm/config"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (200):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "success",
    "message": "操作成功",
    "data": {
        "tos_url": null,
        "is_email_verify": 0,
        "is_invite_force": 0,
        "email_whitelist_suffix": 0,
        "is_captcha": 0,
        "captcha_type": "recaptcha",
        "recaptcha_site_key": null,
        "recaptcha_v3_site_key": null,
        "recaptcha_v3_score_threshold": 0.5,
        "turnstile_site_key": null,
        "app_description": null,
        "app_url": null,
        "logo": null,
        "is_recaptcha": 0
    },
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

GET api/v1/guest/comm/config

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   object     

发送邮箱验证码

用于在用户注册或找回密码时，向指定邮箱发送含有6位验证码的邮件。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/comm/sendEmailVerify" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"demo@test.com\",
    \"turnstile\": \"labore\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/comm/sendEmailVerify"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "demo@test.com",
    "turnstile": "labore"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/passport/comm/sendEmailVerify

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

需要接收验证码的电子邮箱 Example: demo@test.com

turnstile   string  optional    

Turnstile/recaptcha等极验证码的Token（若系统开启人机验证则必填） Example: labore

记录邀请链接访问次数 (PV)

用户访问他人的邀请链接时，后台静默记录1次PV浏览量。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/comm/pv" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"invite_code\": \"abc12345\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/comm/pv"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "invite_code": "abc12345"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

invite_code   string     

推广邀请码 Example: abc12345

Auth 模块

用户注册

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/register" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"user@example.com\",
    \"password\": \"password123\",
    \"invite_code\": \"ducimus\",
    \"email_code\": \"iste\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "invite_code": "ducimus",
    "email_code": "iste"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/passport/auth/register

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

电子邮箱地址 Example: user@example.com

password   string     

密码，至少8位 Example: password123

invite_code   string  optional    

邀请码（选填） Example: ducimus

email_code   string  optional    

邮箱验证码（如果开启验证则必填） Example: iste

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
auth_data   string     

认证口令 (Token)

用户登录

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/login" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"user@example.com\",
    \"password\": \"password123\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/passport/auth/login

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

电子邮箱地址 Example: user@example.com

password   string     

登录密码 Example: password123

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
auth_data   string     

认证口令 (Token)

通过token登录

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/token2Login?token=velit&verify=laudantium&redirect=et" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/token2Login"
);

const params = {
    "token": "velit",
    "verify": "laudantium",
    "redirect": "et",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (302):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
location: https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=velit&redirect=et
content-type: text/html; charset=utf-8
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
    <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8" />
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url='https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=velit&amp;redirect=et'" />

        <title>Redirecting to https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=velit&amp;redirect=et</title>
    </head>
    <body>
        Redirecting to <a href="https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=velit&amp;redirect=et">https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=velit&amp;redirect=et</a>.
    </body>
</html>
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/passport/auth/token2Login

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

token   string  optional    

重定向Token（二选一） Example: velit

verify   string  optional    

验证Token（二选一） Example: laudantium

redirect   string  optional    

重定向路径 Example: et

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
auth_data   string     

认证口令 (Token)

忘记密码处理

curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/forget" \

    \"password\": \"newpassword123\",
    \"email_code\": \"odio\"
}"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/forget"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "newpassword123",
    "email_code": "odio"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v1/passport/auth/forget

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

注册时使用的电子邮箱 Example: user@example.com

password   string     

新密码 Example: newpassword123

email_code   string     

邮件里的找回验证码 Example: odio

获取快速登录URL

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/getQuickLoginUrl" \

    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"auth_data\": \"architecto\",
    \"redirect\": \"non\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/passport/auth/getQuickLoginUrl"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "auth_data": "architecto",
    "redirect": "non"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v1/passport/auth/getQuickLoginUrl

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

auth_data   string  optional    

认证凭据 (Header/Authorization同样有效) Example: architecto

redirect   string  optional    

登录成功后的跳转地址 Example: non

Response

Response Fields

data   string

};

Request      

POST api/v1/passport/auth/loginWithMailLink

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

用户的电子邮箱地址 Example: admin@demo.com

redirect   string  optional    

登录成功后重定向的路径 Example: /dashboard

Response

Response Fields

data   boolean     

成功返回 true

用户注册

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/passport/auth/register" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"user@example.com\",
    \"password\": \"password123\",
    \"invite_code\": \"deleniti\",
    \"email_code\": \"voluptatibus\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/passport/auth/register"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123",
    "invite_code": "deleniti",
    "email_code": "voluptatibus"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v2/passport/auth/register

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

电子邮箱地址 Example: user@example.com

password   string     

密码，至少8位 Example: password123

invite_code   string  optional    

邀请码（选填） Example: deleniti

email_code   string  optional    

邮箱验证码（如果开启验证则必填） Example: voluptatibus

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
auth_data   string     

认证口令 (Token)

用户登录

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/passport/auth/login" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"email\": \"user@example.com\",
    \"password\": \"password123\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/passport/auth/login"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "email": "user@example.com",
    "password": "password123"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v2/passport/auth/login

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

email   string     

电子邮箱地址 Example: user@example.com

password   string     

登录密码 Example: password123

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
auth_data   string     

认证口令 (Token)

通过token登录

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/passport/auth/token2Login?token=corporis&verify=voluptatem&redirect=ratione" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/passport/auth/token2Login"
);

const params = {
    "token": "corporis",
    "verify": "voluptatem",
    "redirect": "ratione",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (302):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
location: https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=corporis&redirect=ratione
content-type: text/html; charset=utf-8
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
    <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8" />
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0;url='https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=corporis&amp;redirect=ratione'" />

        <title>Redirecting to https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=corporis&amp;redirect=ratione</title>
    </head>
    <body>
        Redirecting to <a href="https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=corporis&amp;redirect=ratione">https://47.79.38.161/#/login?verify=corporis&amp;redirect=ratione</a>.
    </body>
</html>
Received response:

GET api/v2/passport/auth/token2Login

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

token   string  optional    

重定向Token（二选一） Example: corporis

verify   string  optional    

验证Token（二选一） Example: voluptatem

redirect   string  optional    

重定向路径 Example: ratione

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
auth_data   string     

认证口令 (Token)

忘记密码处理

POST api/v2/passport/auth/loginWithMailLink

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Example: application/json

email   string

User 模块

重置订阅链接与安全凭证

为当前用户刷新生成全新的订阅链接Token。原有的所有订阅链接与连接密码将立即作废。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/resetSecurity" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/resetSecurity"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   string

修改用户密码

验证原有密码后，修改用户登录密码，并在修改成功后移除其他设备Token。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/changePassword" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"old_password\": \"oldpassword123\",
    \"new_password\": \"newpassword123\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/changePassword"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "old_password": "oldpassword123",
    "new_password": "newpassword123"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type

Example: application/json

原密码 Example: oldpassword123

new_password   string     

新密码 Example: newpassword123

修改通知偏好设置

修改用户关于流量耗尽或套餐过期时的邮件提醒开关。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/update" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"remind_expire\": true,
    \"remind_traffic\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/update"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "remind_expire": true,
    "remind_traffic": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v1/user/update

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

remind_expire   boolean  optional    

开启订阅到期邮件提醒 Example: true

remind_traffic   boolean  optional    

开启流量告警邮件提醒 Example: false

获取订阅信息与流量详情

核心接口之一。这会返回用户当前拥有的套餐配置、订阅链接、已用上下行流量、剩余到期天数等数据。

    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/getSubscribe" \

获取免密快速登录URL (快速登录)

在客户端或特定场景下，通过已有认证Token，换取一个可以直接在浏览器授权登录系统的临时安全URL请求地址。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/getQuickLoginUrl?redirect=%2Fdashboard" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/getQuickLoginUrl"
);

    "redirect": "/dashboard",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

重置订阅链接与安全凭证

为当前用户刷新生成全新的订阅链接Token。原有的所有订阅链接与连接密码将立即作废。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/user/resetSecurity" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/user/resetSecurity"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *

    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Content-Type

Order 模块

创建订单

创建一个新的购买或续费订阅计划的订单。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"plan_id\": 1,
    \"period\": \"month\",
    \"coupon_code\": \"magni\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "plan_id": 1,
    "period": "month",
    "coupon_code": "magni"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/order/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

plan_id   integer     

订阅计划的ID Example: 1

period   string     

购买周期（如 month, quarter, half_year, year） Example: month

coupon_code   string  optional    

优惠券码（可选） Example: magni

Response

Response Fields

data   string     

订单支付(Checkout)

将创建好的订单发起支付，选择支付网关提交。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/checkout" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"trade_no\": \"2023010112345678\",
    \"method\": 1,
    \"token\": \"veniam\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/checkout"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "trade_no": "2023010112345678",
    "method": 1,
    "token": "veniam"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/order/checkout

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

trade_no   string     

需要支付的订单号 Example: 2023010112345678

method   integer     

支付方式ID（通过获取支付方式接口获取） Example: 1

token   string  optional    

Stripe支付Token等相关参数（可选） Example: veniam

Response

Response Fields

type   integer     

返回动作类型(-1:无需跳转 0:URL跳转 1:HTML代码渲染)

data   string     

检查订单状态

轮询查询某个订单当前的支付或处理状态。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/check?trade_no=2023010112345678" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/check"
);

const params = {
    "trade_no": "2023010112345678",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/user/order/check

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

trade_no   string     

订单流水号 Example: 2023010112345678

Response

Response Fields

data   integer     

订单当前状态(0:待支付 1:开通中 2:已取消 3:已完成)

获取订单详情

根据订单号（trade_no）获取特定订单的详细信息，包括支付方式和订阅计划。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/detail?trade_no=2023010112345678" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"trade_no\": \"et\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/detail"
);

const params = {
    "trade_no": "2023010112345678",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "trade_no": "et"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}

Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/user/order/detail

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

trade_no   string     

订单流水号 Example: 2023010112345678

Body Parameters

trade_no   string     

Example: et

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
trade_no   string     
total_amount        

numeric

status   integer     

获取订单列表

获取当前用户的订单列表，可以按照订单状态筛选。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/fetch?status=1" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"status\": 3
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "status": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status": 3
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/user/order/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

status   integer  optional    

订单状态筛选(0:待支付 1:已支付 2:已取消 3:已完成) Example: 1

Body Parameters

status   integer  optional    

Example: 3

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
  • 2
  • 3

Response

Response Fields

data   string[]

取消订单

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/order/cancel" \

Headers

Invite 模块

生成新的邀请码

用户生成一个属于自己的推广邀请码（有创建数量上限限制）。

    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/invite/save" \

GET api/v1/user/invite/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   boolean     

成功为 true

获取邀请面板统计信息

一次性获取当前用户的专属邀请码、已邀请人数、确认中和已到账的佣金数额和提成比例。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/invite/fetch" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/invite/fetch"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/user/invite/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   object     
codes   string[]     
stat   string[]     

统计数组：[0=>已注册用户数, 1=>总计有效佣金, 2=>确认中佣金, 3=>当前抽成比例, 4=>当前可用佣金余额]

获取返利佣金明细记录

分页查询当前用户邀请下线后获得的每笔返利金额流水。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/invite/details?current=1&page_size=10" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/invite/details"
);

const params = {
    "current": "1",
    "page_size": "10",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

GET api/v1/user/invite/details

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

current   integer  optional    

当前页码 Example: 1

page_size   integer  optional    

每页展示数量 Example: 10

Response

Response Fields

Ticket 模块

回复工单

在已有的工单下追加新的消息回复管理员。若工单已关闭则无法回复。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/reply" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 1,
    \"message\": \"请问什么时候能处理好？\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/reply"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 1,
    "message": "请问什么时候能处理好？"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/ticket/reply

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

需要回复的工单ID Example: 1

message   string     

回复的具体内容 Example: 请问什么时候能处理好？

关闭工单

用户主动关闭自己目前处于开启状态的售后工单。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/close" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/close"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/ticket/close

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

要关闭的工单ID Example: 1

创建工单

用户发起新的技术支持或财务支持工单。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"subject\": \"支付问题\",
    \"level\": 1,
    \"message\": \"我支付了没有到账\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "subject": "支付问题",
    "level": 1,
    "message": "我支付了没有到账"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/ticket/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

subject   string     

工单主题或简短标题 Example: 支付问题

level   integer     

优先级类型(1:普通 2:重要等) Example: 1

message   string     

工单正文详细描述 Example: 我支付了没有到账

获取工单列表/详情

如果未传 id，则返回该用户所有的工单列表；如果传入 id，则返回该工单的对话流详情。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/fetch?id=1" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "id": "1",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/user/ticket/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

id   integer  optional    

需要查看详情的特定工单的ID (可选) Example: 1

Response

Response Fields

data        

array|object 如果没有传ID返回工单组，否则返回工单对象包含具体 message

发起提现工单申请

如果用户的推广佣金余额达到可提现门槛，可以通过此接口直接通过自动创建提现工单向管理员发起申请。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/withdraw" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"withdraw_method\": \"alipay\",
    \"withdraw_account\": \"admin@alipay.com\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/ticket/withdraw"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "withdraw_method": "alipay",
    "withdraw_account": "admin@alipay.com"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/ticket/withdraw

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

withdraw_method   string     

选择的提现方式(alipay, usdt等) Example: alipay

withdraw_account   string     

收款账号信息 Example: admin@alipay.com

Server 模块

获取可用服务器节点

返回当前用户在活跃订阅状态下有权限使用的全部服务端点列表（自动携带 ETag 控制缓存）。

Example request:

    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/server/fetch" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \

);

};

Coupon 模块

校验/获取优惠券信息

用于在购物车或订单结算时，查询输入兑换码对应的折扣详情。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/coupon/check" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"88888888\",
    \"plan_id\": 15,
    \"period\": \"nam\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/coupon/check"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "88888888",
    "plan_id": 15,
    "period": "nam"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v1/user/coupon/check

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

优惠券代码 Example: 88888888

plan_id   integer  optional    

拟购买的订阅套餐ID Example: 15

period   string  optional    

拟购买的时长类型（如 month, year等） Example: nam

Response

Response Fields

data   object     

Gift-card 模块

查询兑换码信息

用于检查用户提交的礼品卡/兑换码卡密的有效性，并返回面额及绑定奖励的预览信息。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/gift-card/check" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --header "Authorization: Bearer k2Rh56vUvfKvRQwBoaB8iyYdXLvgO2XUEwtJ3unj40bf831d" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"ABCD-1234\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/gift-card/check"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "ABCD-1234"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

POST api/v1/user/gift-card/check

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

礼品兑换码 Example: ABCD-1234

使用兑换码

正式消耗一张礼品卡，将其包含的余额或时长充值进入当前用户的账户内。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/gift-card/redeem" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"ABCD-1234\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/gift-card/redeem"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "ABCD-1234"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

获取用户兑换记录

查询当前用户历史上兑换过的所有礼品卡记录，支持分页。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/gift-card/history?page=1&per_page=15" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"page\": 17,
    \"per_page\": 20
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/gift-card/history"
);

const params = {
    "page": "1",
    "per_page": "15",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "page": 17,
    "per_page": 20
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/v1/user/gift-card/history

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

当前页码 Example: 1

validation.min. Example: 17

per_page   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 20

Knowledge 模块

获取知识库文章列表/详情

用于前端知识库中心的文章展示，支持通过传递ID查看详细正文，支持按语言检索和关键字模糊搜索。 当获取到正文内容时，系统会自动替换文章中包含的动态标签（如 {{subscribeUrl}} 自动替换为用户的订阅地址）。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/knowledge/fetch?id=1&language=zh-CN&keyword=fugiat" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 8,
    \"language\": \"rqf\",
    \"keyword\": \"zetngly\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/knowledge/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "id": "1",
    "language": "zh-CN",
    "keyword": "fugiat",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 8,
    "language": "rqf",
    "keyword": "zetngly"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "status": "fail",
    "message": "未登录或登陆已过期",
    "data": null,
    "error": null
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v1/user/knowledge/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

id   integer  optional    

可选，如果不传则返回列表，如果传了特定文章ID则返回单篇详情 Example: 1

language   string  optional    

按照语种筛选文章（默认en/zh等） Example: zh-CN

keyword   string  optional    

关键字搜索标题或内容 Example: fugiat

Body Parameters

id   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 8

language   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: rqf

keyword   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: zetngly

Response

Response Fields

data        

array|object

Stat 模块

获取历史流量消耗日志

返回用户本月内每天（或每次记录点）上行和下行的流量消耗统计数据日志。 常用于绘制前端流量走势图。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/stat/getTrafficLog" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v1/user/stat/getTrafficLog"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

管理后台 API (Admin)

Config 模块

获取系统全量配置

获取后台各项模块设置，如：站点开启注册、订阅模板配置、安全策略阈值等。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/fetch?key=voluptas" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "key": "voluptas",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/config/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

key   string  optional    

特定配置分组的键名（可选，如：invite, site等） Example: voluptas

保存系统配置修改

用于管理员在配置中心进行各项变更后的保存下发。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"invite_commission\": 6,
    \"invite_gen_limit\": 17,
    \"commission_withdraw_limit\": 98094.909526,
    \"commission_distribution_l1\": 21326.3396,
    \"commission_distribution_l2\": 4597.3,
    \"commission_distribution_l3\": 1627643,
    \"logo\": \"http:\\/\\/www.maggio.com\\/\",
    \"app_name\": \"provident\",
    \"app_url\": \"http:\\/\\/www.schaefer.info\\/porro-magni-possimus-dignissimos-aut\",
    \"try_out_plan_id\": 18,
    \"try_out_hour\": 6787,
    \"tos_url\": \"http:\\/\\/harris.com\\/\",
    \"reset_traffic_method\": 3,
    \"server_token\": \"fhxjmzaonxolpppcvzzebichreyoptkbxuzyqlhmokiqsaehilm\",
    \"server_pull_interval\": 1,
    \"server_push_interval\": 13,
    \"device_limit_mode\": 20,
    \"server_ws_enable\": true,
    \"server_ws_url\": \"http:\\/\\/www.grimes.org\\/est-sit-quisquam-odio-similique-libero-autem.html\",
    \"frontend_theme_sidebar\": \"light\",
    \"frontend_theme_header\": \"light\",
    \"frontend_theme_color\": \"default\",
    \"frontend_background_url\": \"http:\\/\\/www.larkin.com\\/voluptates-facere-facilis-iste.html\",
    \"telegram_webhook_url\": \"https:\\/\\/collier.org\\/totam-animi-nisi-in-est-quod-iusto-ratione.html\",
    \"telegram_discuss_link\": \"https:\\/\\/www.mueller.com\\/alias-omnis-velit-et-in-rerum-assumenda\",
    \"email_whitelist_enable\": true,
    \"email_gmail_limit_enable\": true,
    \"captcha_enable\": true,
    \"captcha_type\": \"recaptcha-v3\",
    \"recaptcha_enable\": true,
    \"recaptcha_v3_score_threshold\": 1,
    \"email_verify\": false,
    \"safe_mode_enable\": false,
    \"register_limit_by_ip_enable\": true,
    \"register_limit_count\": 1,
    \"register_limit_expire\": 5,
    \"secure_path\": \"phvbpiurpslxqbykqjvilcfobas\",
    \"password_limit_enable\": true,
    \"password_limit_count\": 10,
    \"password_limit_expire\": 6,
    \"default_remind_expire\": false,
    \"default_remind_traffic\": false,
    \"*\": \"assumenda\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "invite_commission": 6,
    "invite_gen_limit": 17,
    "commission_withdraw_limit": 98094.909526,
    "commission_distribution_l1": 21326.3396,
    "commission_distribution_l2": 4597.3,
    "commission_distribution_l3": 1627643,
    "logo": "http:\/\/www.maggio.com\/",
    "app_name": "provident",
    "app_url": "http:\/\/www.schaefer.info\/porro-magni-possimus-dignissimos-aut",
    "try_out_plan_id": 18,
    "try_out_hour": 6787,
    "tos_url": "http:\/\/harris.com\/",
