    "server_token": "fhxjmzaonxolpppcvzzebichreyoptkbxuzyqlhmokiqsaehilm",
    "server_pull_interval": 1,
    "server_push_interval": 13,
    "device_limit_mode": 20,
    "server_ws_enable": true,
    "server_ws_url": "http:\/\/www.grimes.org\/est-sit-quisquam-odio-similique-libero-autem.html",
    "frontend_theme_sidebar": "light",
    "frontend_theme_header": "light",
    "frontend_theme_color": "default",
    "frontend_background_url": "http:\/\/www.larkin.com\/voluptates-facere-facilis-iste.html",
    "telegram_webhook_url": "https:\/\/collier.org\/totam-animi-nisi-in-est-quod-iusto-ratione.html",
    "telegram_discuss_link": "https:\/\/www.mueller.com\/alias-omnis-velit-et-in-rerum-assumenda",
    "email_whitelist_enable": true,
    "email_gmail_limit_enable": true,
    "captcha_enable": true,
    "captcha_type": "recaptcha-v3",
    "recaptcha_enable": true,
    "recaptcha_v3_score_threshold": 1,
    "email_verify": false,
    "safe_mode_enable": false,
    "register_limit_by_ip_enable": true,
    "register_limit_count": 1,
    "register_limit_expire": 5,
    "secure_path": "phvbpiurpslxqbykqjvilcfobas",
    "password_limit_enable": true,
    "password_limit_count": 10,
    "password_limit_expire": 6,
    "default_remind_expire": false,
    "default_remind_traffic": false,
    "*": "assumenda"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/config/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

invite_force   string  optional    
invite_commission   integer  optional    

Example: 6

invite_gen_limit   integer  optional    

Example: 17

invite_never_expire   string  optional    
commission_first_time_enable   string  optional    
commission_auto_check_enable   string  optional    
commission_withdraw_limit   number  optional    

Example: 98094.909526

commission_withdraw_method   object  optional    
withdraw_close_enable   string  optional    
commission_distribution_enable   string  optional    
commission_distribution_l1   number  optional    

Example: 21326.3396

commission_distribution_l2   number  optional    

Example: 4597.3

commission_distribution_l3   number  optional    

Example: 1627643

logo   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.maggio.com/

force_https   string  optional    
stop_register   string  optional    
app_name   string  optional    

站点名称 (可选示例) Example: provident

app_description   string  optional    
app_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.schaefer.info/porro-magni-possimus-dignissimos-aut

subscribe_url   string  optional    
try_out_enable   string  optional    
try_out_plan_id   integer  optional    

Example: 18

try_out_hour   number  optional    

Example: 6787

tos_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://harris.com/

currency   string  optional    
currency_symbol   string  optional    
ticket_must_wait_reply   string  optional    
plan_change_enable   string  optional    
reset_traffic_method   string  optional    

Example: 3

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
  • 2
  • 3
  • 4
surplus_enable   string  optional    
new_order_event_id   string  optional    
renew_order_event_id   string  optional    
change_order_event_id   string  optional    
show_info_to_server_enable   string  optional    
show_protocol_to_server_enable   string  optional    
subscribe_path   string  optional    
server_token   string  optional    

validation.min. Example: fhxjmzaonxolpppcvzzebichreyoptkbxuzyqlhmokiqsaehilm

server_pull_interval   integer  optional    

Example: 1

server_push_interval   integer  optional    

Example: 13

device_limit_mode   integer  optional    

Example: 20

server_ws_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

server_ws_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.grimes.org/est-sit-quisquam-odio-similique-libero-autem.html

frontend_theme   string  optional    
frontend_theme_sidebar   string  optional    

Example: light

Must be one of:
  • dark
  • light
frontend_theme_header   string  optional    

Example: light

Must be one of:
  • dark
  • light
frontend_theme_color   string  optional    

Example: default

Must be one of:
  • default
  • darkblue
  • black
  • green
frontend_background_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.larkin.com/voluptates-facere-facilis-iste.html

email_template   string  optional    
email_host   string  optional    
email_port   string  optional    
email_username   string  optional    
email_password   string  optional    
email_encryption   string  optional    
email_from_address   string  optional    
remind_mail_enable   string  optional    
telegram_bot_enable   string  optional    
telegram_bot_token   string  optional    
telegram_webhook_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: https://collier.org/totam-animi-nisi-in-est-quod-iusto-ratione.html

telegram_discuss_id   string  optional    
telegram_channel_id   string  optional    
telegram_discuss_link   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: https://www.mueller.com/alias-omnis-velit-et-in-rerum-assumenda

windows_version   string  optional    
windows_download_url   string  optional    
macos_version   string  optional    
macos_download_url   string  optional    
android_version   string  optional    
android_download_url   string  optional    
email_whitelist_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

email_whitelist_suffix   object  optional    
email_gmail_limit_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

captcha_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

captcha_type   string  optional    

Example: recaptcha-v3

Must be one of:
  • recaptcha
  • turnstile
  • recaptcha-v3
recaptcha_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

recaptcha_key   string  optional    
recaptcha_site_key   string  optional    
recaptcha_v3_secret_key   string  optional    
recaptcha_v3_site_key   string  optional    
recaptcha_v3_score_threshold   number  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 1

turnstile_secret_key   string  optional    
turnstile_site_key   string  optional    
email_verify   boolean  optional    

Example: false

safe_mode_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: false

register_limit_by_ip_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

register_limit_count   integer  optional    

Example: 1

register_limit_expire   integer  optional    

Example: 5

secure_path   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^[\w-]*$/. validation.min. Example: phvbpiurpslxqbykqjvilcfobas

password_limit_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: true

password_limit_count   integer  optional    

Example: 10

password_limit_expire   integer  optional    

Example: 6

default_remind_expire   boolean  optional    

Example: false

default_remind_traffic   boolean  optional    

Example: false

subscribe_template_singbox   string  optional    
subscribe_template_clash   string  optional    
subscribe_template_clashmeta   string  optional    
subscribe_template_stash   string  optional    
subscribe_template_surge   string  optional    
subscribe_template_surfboard   string  optional    
*   mixed  optional    

被更改的其他配置 KV 键值对 Example: assumenda

获取已有邮件模板列表

读取并返回系统 view/mail 目录中支持的所有邮件模板文件名。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/getEmailTemplate" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/getEmailTemplate"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/config/getEmailTemplate

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   string[]

设定/更新 Telegram Webhook

当管理员修改了系统绑定 TG 机器人的 Token 时，向 TG 官网服务器请求注册最新的回调 Webhook 地址。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/setTelegramWebhook" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"telegram_bot_token\": \"ipsam\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/setTelegramWebhook"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "telegram_bot_token": "ipsam"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/config/setTelegramWebhook

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

telegram_bot_token   string     

Telegram Bot的密钥 Example: ipsam

测试发送测试邮件

利用管理员配置好的 SMTP 发信参数，给管理员自己的邮箱发一封测试邮件探针，用于效验发信配置是否连通。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/testSendMail" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/config/testSendMail"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Plan 模块

获取后台订阅套餐列表

查询系统中建立的所有商品套餐信息，并附带关联查询该套餐下当前正在活跃使用的人数。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/fetch" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/fetch"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/plan/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Response

Response Fields

data   string[]     

创建或保存（修改）订阅套餐

录入全套新建的套餐基本信息、流量配额限制及标价内容。如果携带了 ID 则是修改现存套餐； 修改时可勾选force_update来强制同步更新已购买此套餐的用户的流量/设备阈值。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 3,
    \"name\": \"utj\",
    \"content\": \"ut\",
    \"reset_traffic_method\": 12,
    \"transfer_enable\": 34,
    \"prices\": [
        45
    ],
    \"group_id\": 10,
    \"speed_limit\": 63,
    \"device_limit\": 32,
    \"capacity_limit\": 55,
    \"force_update\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 3,
    "name": "utj",
    "content": "ut",
    "reset_traffic_method": 12,
    "transfer_enable": 34,
    "prices": [
        45
    ],
    "group_id": 10,
    "speed_limit": 63,
    "device_limit": 32,
    "capacity_limit": 55,
    "force_update": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plan/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer  optional    

如果是修改必须传原ID Example: 3

name   string     

validation.max. Example: utj

content   string  optional    

Example: ut

reset_traffic_method   integer  optional    

Example: 12

transfer_enable   integer     

validation.min. Example: 34

prices   number[]  optional    

validation.min.

group_id   integer  optional    

Example: 10

speed_limit   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 63

device_limit   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 32

capacity_limit   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 55

tags   object  optional    
force_update   boolean  optional    

是否强制同步变更到存量用户身上 Example: false

彻底删除某个订阅套餐

该操作只有在套餐未被任何用户订阅、且无关联订单购买记录时才能执行，否则应选择下架(隐藏)该套餐。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/drop" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 3
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/drop"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 3
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plan/drop

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

需要删除的套餐ID Example: 3

快捷更新套餐状态（上下架/可续费）

仅快速更改套餐是否展示、是否允许购买、是否允许续费等单个开关按钮的状态。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/update" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 12,
    \"show\": false,
    \"renew\": true,
    \"sell\": true
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/update"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 12,
    "show": false,
    "renew": true,
    "sell": true
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plan/update

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

所需更新的订阅套餐ID Example: 12

show   boolean  optional    

前台是否展示 Example: false

renew   boolean  optional    

是否允许续费 Example: true

sell   boolean  optional    

是否允许新购 Example: true

更新前台套餐展示排序

管理员在前端拖拽重新调整套餐卡片出场顺序后，提交通知的全量ID重排序列。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/sort" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"ids\": [
        3,
        1,
        2
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plan/sort"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "ids": [
        3,
        1,
        2
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type

建立保存配置新建分组

记录写下一个全新的服分组类别记录。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/group/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 8,
    \"name\": \"voluptatibus\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/group/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 8,
    "name": "voluptatibus"
};

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/server/group/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer  optional    

如果带传入则是修改旧有的分组名称而并非新建 Example: 8

name   string     

被分配的识别名称（例: [VIP3] 东南亚原生服） Example: voluptatibus

从系统移除删除废弃服务器分组

检查验证如果当前这个需要删除的组中还正在关联任意物理机节点、用户，则不允许操作。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/group/drop" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 10
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/group/drop"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 10
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

需要物理抹除的机器类别分组记录 ID 号 Example: 10

Server\Route 模块

拉出目前现役的全部路由策略/过滤分流策略

此控制器专供于节点侧应用类似于V2ray/Xray的黑洞IP阻断策略与白名单DNS清洗列表管理查阅。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/route/fetch" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/route/fetch"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

增加/更新定制拦截路由记录

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/route/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"remarks\": \"voluptatem\",
    \"match\": [
        \"quia\"
    ],
    \"action\": \"consectetur\",
    \"id\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/route/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "remarks": "voluptatem",
    "match": [
        "quia"
    ],
    "action": "consectetur",
    "id": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/server/route/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

remarks   string     

备忘名称 Example: voluptatem

match   string[]     

需要拦截或放行的数组如 geosite:cn 或者 IP集合

action   string     

处理模式 in:block(阻断),direct(直行),dns(转包验证解析),proxy(强制兜底代理) Example: consectetur

action_value   string  optional    
id   integer  optional    

带入意味着覆盖这条记录的内容 Example: 1

删除不再使用或废弃掉的分流屏蔽策略指令

Server\Manage 模块

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/update

Headers

Content-Type

Accept

保存/更新基础节点配置

主要定义该服务器的基础参数如连接信息、倍率、倍率组及所属父级分类。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"socks\",
    \"spectific_key\": \"culpa\",
    \"code\": \"officia\",
    \"name\": \"fugit\",
    \"parent_id\": 4,
    \"host\": \"sapiente\",
    \"port\": 10,
    \"server_port\": 12,
    \"tags\": [
        \"ea\"
    ],
    \"rate\": 15755720.2324,
    \"rate_time_enable\": false,
    \"transfer_enable\": 40,
    \"rate_time_ranges\": [
        {
            \"start\": \"03:27\",
            \"end\": \"03:27\",
            \"rate\": 35
        }
    ],
    \"id\": 18
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "socks",
    "spectific_key": "culpa",
    "code": "officia",
    "name": "fugit",
    "parent_id": 4,
    "host": "sapiente",
    "port": 10,
    "server_port": 12,
    "tags": [
        "ea"
    ],
    "rate": 15755720.2324,
    "rate_time_enable": false,
    "transfer_enable": 40,
    "rate_time_ranges": [
        {
            "start": "03:27",
            "end": "03:27",
            "rate": 35
        }
    ],
    "id": 18
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

type   string     

Example: socks

Must be one of:
  • hysteria
  • vless
  • trojan
  • vmess
  • tuic
  • shadowsocks
  • anytls
  • socks
  • naive
  • http
  • mieru
spectific_key   string  optional    

Example: culpa

code   string  optional    

Example: officia

show   string  optional    
name   string     

用户前台查看的友好名称 Example: fugit

group_ids   object  optional    
route_ids   object  optional    
parent_id   integer  optional    

Example: 4

host   string     

IP或域名指向 Example: sapiente

port   integer     

连接端口 Example: 10

server_port   integer     

落地端口 Example: 12

tags   string[]  optional    

自动呈现下方的节点标签

excludes   object  optional    
ips   object  optional    
rate   number     

扣量倍率 1.0 即一倍 Example: 15755720.2324

rate_time_enable   boolean  optional    

Example: false

rate_time_ranges   object[]  optional    
start   string  optional    

This field is required when rate_time_ranges is present. Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 03:27

end   string  optional    

This field is required when rate_time_ranges is present. Must be a valid date in the format H:i. Example: 03:27

rate   number  optional    

This field is required when rate_time_ranges is present. validation.min. Example: 35

custom_outbounds   object  optional    
custom_routes   object  optional    
cert_config   object  optional    
protocol_settings   object  optional    
transfer_enable   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 40

id   integer  optional    

修改时携带目标主编号 Example: 18

销毁彻底删除指定节点

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/server/manage/drop" \

id   integer     

需要根绝清理的节点服的 ID Example: 18

生成的克隆节点默认自动处于[隐藏不显示]以及流量空计状态，需要手动修改后发档。

Order 模块

获取订单列表

查询所有由用户主动或系统开出的账单流水。可专门筛选出包含了渠道返利的明细。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch?is_commission=&current=4&pageSize=15" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "is_commission": "0",
    "current": "4",
    "pageSize": "15",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch

POST api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch

PUT api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch

PATCH api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch

DELETE api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch

OPTIONS api/v2/57a7189f/order/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

is_commission   boolean  optional    

可选，如果为true则仅查询有佣金入账的邀请订单 Example: false

current   integer  optional    

当前页码 Example: 4

pageSize   integer  optional    

每页容量 Example: 15

更新订单抽成状态等简要设置

例如可被用于更改此笔订单的最终返利到账标记等操作。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/update" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"status\": 1,
    \"commission_status\": 2,
    \"trade_no\": \"consequatur\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/update"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "status": 1,
    "commission_status": 2,
    "trade_no": "consequatur"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/order/update

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

status   string  optional    

Example: 1

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
  • 2
  • 3
commission_status   integer  optional    

佣金下发审核是否成功已入账 Example: 2

trade_no   string     

必选更新的订单交易流水号 Example: consequatur

后台强制分发创建订单

管理员代替用户手工在后台挂上一笔未支付的新订阅账单。支持分配特定的购买套餐、时效等等。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/assign" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"plan_id\": 15,
    \"email\": \"shayna90@example.com\",
    \"total_amount\": 19,
    \"period\": \"dolorum\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/assign"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "plan_id": 15,
    "email": "shayna90@example.com",
    "total_amount": 19,
    "period": "dolorum"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/order/assign

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

plan_id   integer     

强行开通并分配指向的商品套餐 ID Example: 15

email   string     

针对分配购买的主人账号邮箱 Example: shayna90@example.com

total_amount   integer     

为该笔订单设置的需收款面值(分) Example: 19

period   string     

这次分配想让它续或买多久 (month/quarter 等) Example: dolorum

手动标记订单已支付

管理员在后台针对处于[挂起/未支付]状态的订单强制设定为支付成功状态（模拟收到现金操作）。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/paid" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"trade_no\": \"unde\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/paid"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "trade_no": "unde"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/order/paid

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

trade_no   string     

订单系统交易号 Example: unde

手动取消未支付订单

管理员在后台直接关闭放弃/驳回某个长时间未入账的僵尸订单记录。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/cancel" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{

}"

);

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

};

}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

获取订单详情

获取单一订单的所有相关连同上下文数据（如用户信息、购买的套餐快照、甚至如果分发了佣金包含的佣金账单记录）。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/detail?id=20" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/order/detail"
);

const params = {
    "id": "20",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

POST api/v2/57a7189f/order/detail

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

id   integer     

需要查询详细信息的记录 ID Example: 20

User 模块

高级筛选分页搜索全站用户

返回经过关联脱敏后的用户主数据大列表并涵盖所持套餐、邮箱等各类简要状态标识。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch?current=20&pageSize=6" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "current": "20",
    "pageSize": "6",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

GET api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch

PUT api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch

PATCH api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch

DELETE api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch

OPTIONS api/v2/57a7189f/user/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

current   integer  optional    

可选，当前加载页 Example: 20

pageSize   integer  optional    

每页要求多少名成员 Example: 6

更新保存普通用户的各类参数

万能操作修改器方法（修改余额、套餐等级、封禁、重设改绑邮箱、加钱扣钱全量大集合修改器）。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/update" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 19,
    \"email\": \"ratke.dannie@example.net\",
    \"password\": \">_r1I\'ow\",
    \"transfer_enable\": 2472884.5020332,
    \"expired_at\": 1,
    \"banned\": true,
    \"plan_id\": 11,
    \"commission_rate\": 18,
    \"discount\": 8,
    \"is_admin\": true,
    \"is_staff\": true,
    \"u\": 6,
    \"d\": 9,
    \"balance\": 81172985,
    \"commission_type\": 11,
    \"commission_balance\": 82324.28,
    \"speed_limit\": 8,
    \"device_limit\": 14
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/update"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 19,
    "email": "ratke.dannie@example.net",
    "password": ">_r1I'ow",
    "transfer_enable": 2472884.5020332,
    "expired_at": 1,
    "banned": true,
    "plan_id": 11,
    "commission_rate": 18,
    "discount": 8,
    "is_admin": true,
    "is_staff": true,
    "u": 6,
    "d": 9,
    "balance": 81172985,
    "commission_type": 11,
    "commission_balance": 82324.28,
    "speed_limit": 8,
    "device_limit": 14
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/update

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

必然传需要改的目标户主 Example: 19

email   string  optional    

validation.email. Example: ratke.dannie@example.net

password   string  optional    

validation.min. Example: >_r1I'ow

transfer_enable   number  optional    

Example: 2472884.5020332

expired_at   integer  optional    

Example: 1

banned   boolean  optional    

Example: true

plan_id   integer  optional    

Example: 11

commission_rate   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 18

discount   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 8

is_admin   boolean  optional    

Example: true

is_staff   boolean  optional    

Example: true

u   integer  optional    

Example: 6

d   integer  optional    

Example: 9

balance   number  optional    

Example: 81172985

commission_type   integer  optional    

Example: 11

commission_balance   number  optional    

Example: 82324.28

remarks   string  optional    
speed_limit   integer  optional    

Example: 8

device_limit   integer  optional    

Example: 14

矩阵式新户批量生成

管理员可以一次性凭借前缀和随机密码，建立成百上千包含时效/套餐绑定的新账号资源用于下发活动卡。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/generate" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"generate_count\": 3,
    \"expired_at\": 4,
    \"plan_id\": 18,
    \"email_suffix\": \"animi\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/generate"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "generate_count": 3,
    "expired_at": 4,
    "plan_id": 18,
    "email_suffix": "animi"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/generate

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

generate_count   integer  optional    

validation.max. Example: 3

expired_at   integer  optional    

Example: 4

plan_id   integer  optional    

Example: 18

email_prefix   string  optional    
email_suffix   string     

Example: animi

password   string  optional    

大规模导出筛选的用户明细 CSV

把目前筛选出的或者批量选定的用户群体做一次性的资产订阅详情信息文本提取。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/dumpCSV" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"scope\": \"eaque\",
    \"user_ids\": [
        \"officiis\"
    ]
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/dumpCSV"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "scope": "eaque",
    "user_ids": [
        "officiis"
    ]
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/dumpCSV

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

scope   string     

指明目标范围是'selected'手动勾选的 / 'filtered'筛选结果的 还是全部的 Example: eaque

user_ids   string[]  optional    

对选定的生效传入的 ID list

向范围选定用户发送系统批次邮件广播

通过后台调度群发特定的业务推广或者割草提醒。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/user/sendMail" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \

    \"content\": \"aliquid\",
    \"scope\": \"qui\"
}"

POST api/v2/57a7189f/user/sendMail

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

subject   string     

信件主旨 Example: eaque

content   string     

信件富文本代码 Example: aliquid

scope   string  optional    

选择框定人员的群体判定逻辑 Example: qui

重置用户的安全令牌凭据

强制清洗用户的 UUID 和 Token 订阅流地址等防泄漏操作，一般用于用户自诉外泄时的风控强制阻断。

    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getServerYesterdayRank" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getServerYesterdayRank"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

获取财务收入流水及佣金对账表

提供管理控制台有关近期内平台盈利、出款流水的汇总统计对账与每日分图数据。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getOrder?start_date=2024-01-01&end_date=2024-01-31&type=totam" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"start_date\": \"2026-04-15\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-04-15\",
    \"type\": \"commission_total\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getOrder"
);

const params = {
    "start_date": "2024-01-01",
    "end_date": "2024-01-31",
    "type": "totam",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "start_date": "2026-04-15",
    "end_date": "2026-04-15",
    "type": "commission_total"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getOrder

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

start_date   string  optional    

可选检索统计日历起点 Example: 2024-01-01

end_date   string  optional    

可选检索统计日历终点 Example: 2024-01-31

type   string  optional    

抽取单一指定的指标列名称 Example: totam

Body Parameters

start_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-04-15

end_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-04-15

type   string  optional    

Example: commission_total

Must be one of:
  • paid_total
  • paid_count
  • commission_total
  • commission_count

提取特定用户的详细流量上报日志

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getStatUser?user_id=16&pageSize=10" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 13
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getStatUser"
);

const params = {
    "user_id": "16",
    "pageSize": "10",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 13
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

获取最新流量飙车/消耗冠军榜排名

支持查询任意时间段内全平台【消耗流量最大的黑洞老鼠用户列表】或者【承担数据穿透最大的重载服务器列表】及环比同期浮动。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getTrafficRank?type=doloremque&start_time=19&end_time=10" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": \"user\",
    \"start_time\": 5,
    \"end_time\": 23
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getTrafficRank"
);

const params = {
    "type": "doloremque",
    "start_time": "19",
    "end_time": "10",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": "user",
    "start_time": 5,
    "end_time": 23
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/stat/getTrafficRank

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

type   string     

指定输出排行对象的类型，取值 node 或 user Example: doloremque

start_time   integer  optional    

开始计算统计的 UTC 时间戳 Example: 19

end_time   integer  optional    

统计界限终止 UTC 时间戳 Example: 10

Body Parameters

type   string     

Example: user

Must be one of:
  • node
  • user
start_time   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 5

end_time   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 23

Notice 模块

获取公告列表

获取系统内部创建的系统平台公告通知，支持排序返回。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/notice/fetch" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/notice/fetch"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/notice/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

创建/保存编辑公告

新增站点的活动或业务通知文章。如果有 id 则是修改。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/notice/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"title\": \"exercitationem\",
    \"content\": \"explicabo\",
    \"img_url\": \"http:\\/\\/www.rosenbaum.org\\/nisi-dolorem-ea-eum\",
    \"id\": 6,
    \"show\": false,
    \"popup\": true
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/notice/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "title": "exercitationem",
    "content": "explicabo",
    "img_url": "http:\/\/www.rosenbaum.org\/nisi-dolorem-ea-eum",
    "id": 6,
    "show": false,
    "popup": true
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/notice/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

title   string     

公告标题 Example: exercitationem

content   string     

公告主体代码 Example: explicabo

img_url   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.rosenbaum.org/nisi-dolorem-ea-eum

tags   object  optional    
id   integer  optional    

如果是编辑则传这篇公告的 ID Example: 6

show   boolean  optional    

是否显示 Example: false

popup   boolean  optional    

是否需要在用户加载后台时强行弹窗展示 Example: true

彻底抹除公告

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/notice/drop" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \

    \"id\": 17
}"

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {

};

fetch(url, {

    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

id   integer     

待删除公告的 ID Example: 17

公告重排序

拖拽后保存全体公告通知的新排位。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/notice/sort" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"ids\": [
        2,
        1,
        3
    ]
}"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/notice/sort"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "ids": [
        2,
        1,
        3
    ]
};

    headers,

}).then(response => response.json());

Ticket 模块

获取工单列表详情

管理后台分页提取所有用户的客服工单（支持按状态分类显示未完成和已完成工单等不同情况）。 若带 id，则会转为特定工单详情的呈现。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/fetch" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/fetch"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

回复工单消息

客服管理人员进行工单流的文字回复推送。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/reply" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 12,
    \"message\": \"laborum\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/reply"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 12,
    "message": "laborum"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request failed with error:

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/reply

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

需要追加回复文本的目标工单ID Example: 12

message   string     

具体的客服回复段落正文文本 Example: laborum

强制关闭截断工单

针对已处理完毕或者无需回复的情况将该工单状态扭转至“已关闭”。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/close" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 16
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/close"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 16
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/v2/57a7189f/ticket/close

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

需要被彻底关闭不再接受续加信息的工单 ID Example: 16

Coupon 模块

获取优惠券列表

支持多条件过滤检索和自定义排序。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch?current=1&pageSize=10&filter[]=dolores" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "current": "1",
    "pageSize": "10",
    "filter[0]": "dolores",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch

POST api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch

PUT api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch

PATCH api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch

DELETE api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch

OPTIONS api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

current   integer  optional    

当前翻页页码 Example: 1

pageSize   integer  optional    

每页条数 Example: 10

filter   string[]  optional    

高级过滤项数组

生成/编辑优惠券

批量或单张生成特定的面额、比例以及设定特定套餐可用的优惠券。也可用于编辑旧活动优惠券。 若包含 generate_count 参数，则是执行大批量印钞生成操作。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/generate" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"generate_count\": 20,
    \"name\": \"consequatur\",
    \"type\": 2,
    \"value\": 16,
    \"started_at\": 12,
    \"ended_at\": 6,
    \"limit_use\": 10,
    \"limit_use_with_user\": 10,
    \"code\": \"dolorum\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/generate"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "generate_count": 20,
    "name": "consequatur",
    "type": 2,
    "value": 16,
    "started_at": 12,
    "ended_at": 6,
    "limit_use": 10,
    "limit_use_with_user": 10,
    "code": "dolorum"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/generate

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

generate_count   integer  optional    

选填，批量生成数量 (若有此项则走批量生成逻辑并返回csv文本下载) Example: 20

name   string     

Example: consequatur

type   string     

Example: 2

Must be one of:
  • 1
  • 2
value   integer     

优惠面额或者比例（若是比例则 10 代表 10%） Example: 16

started_at   integer     

Example: 12

ended_at   integer     

Example: 6

limit_use   integer  optional    

Example: 10

limit_use_with_user   integer  optional    

Example: 10

limit_plan_ids   object  optional    
limit_period   object  optional    
code   string  optional    

选填，兑换码（如为空则由系统随机生成8位字符） Example: dolorum

彻底删除优惠券

将优惠券实体从数据库中连根拔起地抹除记录。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/drop" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 9
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/drop"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 9
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/drop

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

需要销毁的优惠券ID Example: 9

切换优惠券激活状态

直接对某一张优惠券的可见/可用状态 (show) 进行反转（开变关，关变开）。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/show" \

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept

优惠券 ID Example: 3

更新优惠券信息

主要用于单独更改某优惠券是否显示/可用状态。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/update" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 11,
    \"show\": true
}"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/update"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 11,
    "show": true
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,

}).then(response => response.json());

POST api/v2/57a7189f/coupon/update

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

需要更新的优惠券 ID Example: 11

show   boolean  optional    

是否在前台可见 Example: true

Gift-card 模块

获取礼品卡模板列表

罗列系统中所有的礼品卡原型模板，自带统计此模板已印刷及已消耗的兑换码数量。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates?type=20&page=18" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"type\": 6,
    \"status\": 0,
    \"page\": 5,
    \"per_page\": 13
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates"
);

const params = {
    "type": "20",
    "page": "18",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "type": 6,
    "status": 0,
    "page": 5,
    "per_page": 13
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates

PUT api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates

PATCH api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates

DELETE api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates

OPTIONS api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/templates

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

type   integer  optional    

过滤模板分类 Example: 20

page   integer  optional    

当前页码 Example: 18

Body Parameters

type   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 6

status   integer  optional    

Example: 0

Must be one of:
  • 0
  • 1
page   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 5

per_page   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 13

创建礼品卡模板

建立一张全新的礼品卡派发模板，设定基本属性、包含的面额或赠品种类。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/create-template" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"xmnknkgsqmtytkqtieldhqq\",
    \"description\": \"Reprehenderit vel enim ullam non illo.\",
    \"type\": 10,
    \"status\": false,
    \"rewards\": [],
    \"icon\": \"awwuodpumwxfkkmmiiocp\",
    \"background_image\": \"azuipbpvbysgdcnvkavbjsac\",
    \"theme_color\": \"#5A4Faa\",
    \"sort\": 16
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/create-template"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "xmnknkgsqmtytkqtieldhqq",
    "description": "Reprehenderit vel enim ullam non illo.",
    "type": 10,
    "status": false,
    "rewards": [],
    "icon": "awwuodpumwxfkkmmiiocp",
    "background_image": "azuipbpvbysgdcnvkavbjsac",
    "theme_color": "#5A4Faa",
    "sort": 16
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/create-template

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

validation.max. Example: xmnknkgsqmtytkqtieldhqq

description   string  optional    

Example: Reprehenderit vel enim ullam non illo.

type   integer     

Example: 10

status   boolean  optional    

Example: false

conditions   object  optional    
rewards   object     
limits   object  optional    
special_config   object  optional    
icon   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: awwuodpumwxfkkmmiiocp

background_image   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. validation.max. Example: azuipbpvbysgdcnvkavbjsac

theme_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #5A4Faa

sort   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 16

更新礼品卡模板

更改或调整该原型卡包含的面额价值、限额限制等一切核心属性。不影响在这之前已印发的老卡但影响其后置消耗鉴定。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/update-template" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 6,
    \"name\": \"ddwyznftmfqpekg\",
    \"description\": \"Ut quibusdam quibusdam officia.\",
    \"type\": 9,
    \"status\": true,
    \"icon\": \"crjxhybjeuedehtpqqxmw\",
    \"background_image\": \"fyvnirxuyfl\",
    \"theme_color\": \"#5238C0\",
    \"sort\": 33
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/update-template"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 6,
    "name": "ddwyznftmfqpekg",
    "description": "Ut quibusdam quibusdam officia.",
    "type": 9,
    "status": true,
    "icon": "crjxhybjeuedehtpqqxmw",
    "background_image": "fyvnirxuyfl",
    "theme_color": "#5238C0",
    "sort": 33
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/update-template

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_template table. Example: 6

name   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: ddwyznftmfqpekg

description   string  optional    

Example: Ut quibusdam quibusdam officia.

type   integer  optional    

Example: 9

status   boolean  optional    

Example: true

conditions   object  optional    
rewards   object  optional    
limits   object  optional    
special_config   object  optional    
icon   string  optional    

validation.max. Example: crjxhybjeuedehtpqqxmw

background_image   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. validation.max. Example: fyvnirxuyfl

theme_color   string  optional    

Must match the regex /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/. Example: #5238C0

sort   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 33

删除礼品卡模板

如果该原型模板已经挂载了任何印刷批次的发放真卡记录，则无法直接删除模板。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/delete-template" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 6
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/delete-template"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 6
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/delete-template

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

id   integer     

需要被删除原型模板 ID Example: 6

生成并印发兑换码

基于选定的模板来执行印钱发码工序（最高单批发 10000 码）。并且可选择立即提取 CSV 文件流返回。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/generate-codes" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"template_id\": 6,
    \"count\": 16,
    \"prefix\": \"esse\",
    \"expires_hours\": 78,
    \"max_usage\": 5,
    \"download_csv\": false
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/generate-codes"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "template_id": 6,
    "count": 16,
    "prefix": "esse",
    "expires_hours": 78,
    "max_usage": 5,
    "download_csv": false
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/generate-codes

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

template_id   integer     

制版/模板ID Example: 6

count   integer     

生成码总量数目 Example: 16

prefix   string  optional    

码前缀（支持A-Z及数字） Example: esse

expires_hours   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 78

max_usage   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 5

download_csv   boolean  optional    

传递 1 则返回包含这些码的CSV直下流文件 Example: false

获取发放兑换码列表

高级表格组件，分页获取查询所有的实体真卡卡密情况、是否被兑换、领奖时间等。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"template_id\": 13,
    \"batch_id\": \"quam\",
    \"status\": 0,
    \"page\": 54,
    \"per_page\": 6
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/codes"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "template_id": 13,
    "batch_id": "quam",
    "status": 0,
    "page": 54,
    "per_page": 6
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_template table. Example: 13

  • 0

validation.min. Example: 54

validation.min validation.max. Example: 6

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

实体子卡 ID Example: 12

action   string     

"disable" 或 "enable" 开关联动动作 Example: libero

导出兑换码(直接拉文件)

再次向系统讨要之前的某个印发批次的纯净版纯文本包含每行一码文件的导出下载。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/export-codes" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"batch_id\": \"et\"
}"

);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",

};

};

}).then(response => response.json());

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_code table. Example: 6

获取用户使用核销记录

透视追踪查阅用户在前端具体激活了哪张卡、得到了什么返金/时长等综合对账报表。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"template_id\": 19,
    \"user_id\": 13,
    \"page\": 25,
    \"per_page\": 1
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "template_id": 19,
    "user_id": 13,
    "page": 25,
    "per_page": 1
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages

POST api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages

PUT api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages

PATCH api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages

DELETE api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages

OPTIONS api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/usages

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

template_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the v2_gift_card_template table. Example: 19

user_id   integer  optional    

The id of an existing record in the v2_user table. Example: 13

page   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 25

per_page   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 1

获取礼品系统使用统计大盘数据

面向控制台首页或统计报表界面输出各种汇总总量、时间分片折线使用率图表及占比情况。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/statistics" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"start_date\": \"2026-04-15\",
    \"end_date\": \"2026-04-15\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/gift-card/statistics"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "start_date": "2026-04-15",
    "end_date": "2026-04-15"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-04-15

end_date   string  optional    

Must be a valid date in the format Y-m-d. Example: 2026-04-15

Knowledge 模块

获取知识库文章列表/单页

如果带了 ID 参数则返回具体的那篇文章详情，否则返回所有文章的清单标题和简要信息。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/fetch?id=2" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/fetch"
);

const params = {
    "id": "2",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/fetch

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

id   integer  optional    

过滤查询指定的文章 ID (如果传了只返回这个id详情) Example: 2

保存/创建知识库文章

由管理员新建或者编辑知识库文章主体内容。如果传入了 id 就是更新旧的，否则为新创建。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"category\": \"odio\",
    \"language\": \"voluptate\",
    \"title\": \"illum\",
    \"body\": \"magni\",
    \"show\": false,
    \"id\": 11,
    \"content\": \"quasi\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "category": "odio",
    "language": "voluptate",
    "title": "illum",
    "body": "magni",
    "show": false,
    "id": 11,
    "content": "quasi"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

category   string     

分类名称 Example: odio

language   string     

Example: voluptate

title   string     

文章标题 Example: illum

body   string     

Example: magni

show   boolean  optional    

Example: false

id   integer  optional    

如果是修改现有文章则必须传这篇的ID Example: 11

content   string     

文章主体（通常为Markdown或者富文本） Example: quasi

切换文章是否展示

切换这篇文章是对用户可见展示（开/关）。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/show" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"id\": 2
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/knowledge/show"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "id": 2
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Headers

Content-Type

id   integer     

需要切换开关的知识点ID Example: 2

Payment 模块

curl --request GET \

Headers

Response

Response Fields

data   string[]     

获取支付网关表单配置

针对选择的某个具体支付插件获取其对应的动态表单结构（便于渲染表单让用户填入如商户ID、密钥等）。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/payment/getPaymentForm" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"payment\": \"inventore\",
    \"id\": 20
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/payment/getPaymentForm"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "payment": "inventore",
    "id": 20
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/payment/getPaymentForm

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

payment   string     

支付插件驱动标识名 Example: inventore

id   integer  optional    

现有的支付记录ID（如果传入则附带已有配置值） Example: 20

保存/编辑支付配置

从空白创建一个新的支付通道，或对已有通道参数（支持不同插件的不同表单配置格式）做二次变更。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/payment/save" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"quas\",
    \"payment\": \"rem\",
    \"config\": \"vel\",
    \"notify_domain\": \"http:\\/\\/www.sawayn.net\\/quo-distinctio-labore-in\",
    \"handling_fee_fixed\": 5,
    \"handling_fee_percent\": 0,
    \"id\": 14
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/payment/save"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "quas",
    "payment": "rem",
    "config": "vel",
    "notify_domain": "http:\/\/www.sawayn.net\/quo-distinctio-labore-in",
    "handling_fee_fixed": 5,
    "handling_fee_percent": 0,
    "id": 14
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/payment/save

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

用户前台显示名称 Example: quas

icon   string  optional    
payment   string     

驱动类标识名 Example: rem

config   string     

相关密钥配置的序列化内容 Example: vel

notify_domain   string  optional    

Must be a valid URL. Example: http://www.sawayn.net/quo-distinctio-labore-in

handling_fee_fixed   integer  optional    

额外固定手续费 Example: 5

handling_fee_percent   number  optional    

validation.between. Example: 0

id   integer  optional    

待修改网关ID (新建时不传) Example: 14

删除支付通道

彻底从后台丢弃一个无用的支付网关配置。

curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/payment/drop" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \

}"

    "Accept": "application/json",
};

    "id": 4
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,

Headers

Content-Type

Accept

待删除的支付网关ID Example: 4

System 模块

重获系统关键进程健康情况

检测异步任务队列环境 (Horizon/Schedule) 是否处于正常存活可监控状态下。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getSystemStatus" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getSystemStatus"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/system/getSystemStatus

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

集中统计系统各项工作进程开销和历史堆积量

也就是 Laravel Horizon 的简易总控制面板概览API。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueStats" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueStats"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueStats

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

GET api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueWorkload

Headers

Content-Type
