Get all of the master supervisors and their underlying supervisors.

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueMasters" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueMasters"
);

    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {

}).then(response => response.json());

}

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/system/getQueueMasters

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

获取队列所有曾经爆炸执行失败的报错任务

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getHorizonFailedJobs?current=18&page_size=11" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getHorizonFailedJobs"
);

const params = {
    "current": "18",
    "page_size": "11",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/system/getHorizonFailedJobs

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

current   integer  optional    

页码 Example: 18

page_size   integer  optional    

容量大小 Example: 11

拉取管理员操作行纪审计记录

安全审计和背锅专用溯源检索流。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog?current=4&page_size=20&action=eius&admin_id=19&keyword=modi" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog"
);

const params = {
    "current": "4",
    "page_size": "20",
    "action": "eius",
    "admin_id": "19",
    "keyword": "modi",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog

POST api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog

PUT api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog

PATCH api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog

DELETE api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog

OPTIONS api/v2/57a7189f/system/getAuditLog

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

current   integer  optional    

页码 Example: 4

page_size   integer  optional    

页大小 Example: 20

action   string  optional    

动作类型过滤 Example: eius

admin_id   integer  optional    

只看此位管理的记录 Example: 19

keyword   string  optional    

在参数数据或路径中全文检索 Example: modi

Theme 模块

获取已安装所有前端主题列表及启用情况

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/getThemes" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/getThemes"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/theme/getThemes

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

上传扩展新主题皮肤包

以 .zip 的标准主题规格文件上传到服务器中供前端挑选配置。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/upload" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpFLOpIO" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/upload"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/theme/upload

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

file   file     

Must be a file. validation.max. Example: /tmp/phpFLOpIO

删除物理皮肤结构

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/delete" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"minima\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/delete"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "minima"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/theme/delete

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

想要除去的主题唯一识别代称名 Example: minima

固化更新当前这套特供主题选项

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/saveThemeConfig" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"a\",
    \"config\": []
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/saveThemeConfig"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "a",
    "config": []
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/theme/saveThemeConfig

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

name   string     

需要更新的是这套专属主题代称 Example: a

config   object     

对象格式的该皮肤专属键值对应修改项

获取主题下辖自定义配置表单项集

大多高端主题带有自己专属的幻灯片、页脚修改、色卡调节设置可供调整。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/getThemeConfig?name=distinctio" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"name\": \"rerum\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/theme/getThemeConfig"
);

const params = {
    "name": "distinctio",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "name": "rerum"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/theme/getThemeConfig

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

name   string     

查询对应主题拥有的配置集 Example: distinctio

Body Parameters

name   string     

Example: rerum

Plugin 模块

获取所有插件类型

读取系统内定义好的可用插件类型列表（如功能型、支付型）。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/types" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/types"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/types

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

获取已有插件列表

读取在本地 plugins/ 目录中的所有插件包，获取其元信息并在控制台展示。 支持查询特定的 type 类型过滤。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/getPlugins" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json"
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/getPlugins"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};


fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/getPlugins

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

全新上传自用插件 zip 压缩包

上传符合 xboard 的专用结构打包 .zip。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/upload" \
    --header "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --form "file=@/tmp/phpApnIAa" 
const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/upload"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

const body = new FormData();
body.append('file', document.querySelector('input[name="file"]').files[0]);

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body,
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/upload

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: multipart/form-data

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

file   file     

Must be a file. validation.max. Example: /tmp/phpApnIAa

物理删除无用的插件代码结构

必须已经卸载，系统内置保护核心插件不可被删除。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/delete" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"vero\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/delete"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "vero"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/delete

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

要删代码包的插件标识 Example: vero

安装系统插件

为某个合法存在于内部的插件文件进行挂载和数据库环境搭建初始化。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/install" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"nihil\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/install"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "nihil"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/install

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

目标插件对应的包名代码 Example: nihil

卸载插件

需要其被禁用后方可彻底卸载清除环境资产。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/uninstall" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"sunt\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/uninstall"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "sunt"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/uninstall

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

目标卸载的特征包名 Example: sunt

启动/启用插件功能

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/enable" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"quam\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/enable"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "quam"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/enable

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

code   string     

被操作插件特征包名 Example: quam

关停/禁用插件

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/disable" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"quidem\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/disable"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",

    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/config?code=nostrum" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{

}"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/config"
);

};

    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

对插件自己抛出定义的需要表单配置执行设值。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/config" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"beatae\",
    \"config\": [
        \"enim\"
    ]
}"

    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/config"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "beatae",
    "config": [
        "enim"
    ]
};

    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

升级更新插件

控制台检测到本地包文件 Version 大于数据库记载 Version 时可调用自动更新。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/upgrade" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"code\": \"error\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/plugin/upgrade"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "code": "error"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Content-Type

想要升级打补丁的特征包名 Example: error

Traffic-reset 模块

获取流量重置日志列表

查询记录下来的每一次针对具体用户的流量清重置日志事件。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/logs" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 10,
    \"user_email\": \"connelly.guiseppe@example.com\",
    \"start_date\": \"2026-04-15T03:27:41\",
    \"end_date\": \"2124-04-17\",
    \"per_page\": 19,
    \"page\": 10
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/logs"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 10,
    "user_email": "connelly.guiseppe@example.com",
    "start_date": "2026-04-15T03:27:41",
    "end_date": "2124-04-17",
    "per_page": 19,
    "page": 10
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/logs

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

user_id   integer  optional    

Example: 10

user_email   string  optional    

Example: connelly.guiseppe@example.com

reset_type   string  optional    
trigger_source   string  optional    
start_date   string  optional    

validation.date. Example: 2026-04-15T03:27:41

end_date   string  optional    

validation.date validation.after_or_equal. Example: 2124-04-17

per_page   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 19

page   integer  optional    

validation.min. Example: 10

获取流量重置统计信息

取近多少天内的自动清空和手动清空触发事件的数据占比饼图数据。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/stats?days=30" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"days\": 21
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/stats"
);

const params = {
    "days": "30",
};
Object.keys(params)
    .forEach(key => url.searchParams.append(key, params[key]));

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "days": 21
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:


Tip: Check that you're properly connected to the network.
If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/stats

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Query Parameters

days   integer  optional    

往前回溯天数 Example: 30

Body Parameters

days   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 21

获取单用户流量重置历史

获取指定某位用户历次被清空其用量的详细存档追溯流。

Example request:
curl --request GET \
    --get "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/user/13/history" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"limit\": 13
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/user/13/history"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "limit": 13
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "GET",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Example response (403):

Show headers 
cache-control: no-cache, private
content-type: application/json
access-control-allow-origin: *
 

{
    "message": "Unauthorized"
}
Received response:
Request failed with error:

If you're a maintainer of ths API, verify that your API is running and you've enabled CORS.
You can check the Dev Tools console for debugging information.

Request      

GET api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/user/{userId}/history

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

URL Parameters

userId   integer     

要回溯日志的目标用户 ID Example: 13

Body Parameters

limit   integer  optional    

validation.min validation.max. Example: 13

手动重置用户流量

管理员在后台直接清空重算目标用户累计已使用的上行和下行传输量（一键恢复初始额度）。

Example request:
curl --request POST \
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/reset-user" \
    --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
    --header "Accept: application/json" \
    --data "{
    \"user_id\": 9,
    \"reason\": \"dolorem\"
}"

const url = new URL(
    "https://47.79.38.161/api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/reset-user"
);

const headers = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept": "application/json",
};

let body = {
    "user_id": 9,
    "reason": "dolorem"
};

fetch(url, {
    method: "POST",
    headers,
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
}).then(response => response.json());

Request      

POST api/v2/57a7189f/traffic-reset/reset-user

Headers

Content-Type        

Example: application/json

Accept        

Example: application/json

Body Parameters

user_id   integer     

要清空清算的户主归属 ID Example: 9

reason   string  optional    

手工重置说明/理由/备注 Example: dolorem
